SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF FRANK LABUDZIK IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH KOHLOSS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOANNA SMULSKA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEROME HOSKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA HOSKINS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
